title: Fantasy Landscape Creator
promptText: An epic fantasy landscape depicting [SCENE_DESCRIPTION]. The environment features [TERRAIN_ELEMENTS] under a [SKY_DESCRIPTION] sky. Atmospheric perspective with [WEATHER_CONDITIONS] creating volumetric light rays. Painted in the style of [ART_STYLE] with rich detail in both foreground and background. Color palette dominated by [COLORS]. Ultra-wide composition, matte painting quality, 4K wallpaper resolution. Include small scale references like [SCALE_ELEMENT] to convey the massive scope of the scene.
description: This prompt generates breathtaking fantasy landscapes suitable for game concept art, book covers, desktop wallpapers, or worldbuilding reference images. The inclusion of scale references ensures the AI creates scenes with a sense of grandeur rather than miniature-looking environments. By specifying both terrain elements and atmospheric conditions, you get cohesive environments where every element works together. The art style parameter lets you channel specific visual traditions from classical landscape painting to modern concept art aesthetics.

variables.name: SCENE_DESCRIPTION
variables.example: an ancient elven city built into the side of a crystalline mountain

variables.name: TERRAIN_ELEMENTS
variables.example: cascading waterfalls, bioluminescent forests, and floating stone bridges

variables.name: WEATHER_CONDITIONS
variables.example: light mist rising from the valleys

variables.name: ART_STYLE
variables.example: Studio Ghibli meets classical Hudson River School painting

variables.name: COLORS
variables.example: deep purples, ethereal blues, and warm gold accents

variables.name: SCALE_ELEMENT
variables.example: a tiny caravan of travelers on a winding path

tips: Use negative prompts to exclude modern elements like power lines or cars
Add 'trending on ArtStation' for higher quality concept art results
Specify 'no text, no watermark' to keep the image clean for commercial use
exampleOutput: A sweeping matte painting of an ancient elven city carved into crystalline mountain faces, with cascading waterfalls catching the light of dual moons. Bioluminescent forests glow in the valleys below. Aurora borealis streaks across the twilight sky. A tiny caravan of travelers on a winding stone bridge provides scale to the massive environment.
metaTitle: Fantasy Landscape Creator for Stable Diffusion
metaDescription: Generate epic fantasy landscape art for games, books, and wallpapers. Try this Stable Diffusion prompt for stunning environment concept art.
